The Device

32 sensors.
One headset.
Infinite freedom.

NeuroLink Pro is a lightweight over-ear headset with 32 embedded neural sensors that self-position as you put it on — no gel, no calibration pads, no setup frustration.

🧠

AI That Learns You

Personalizes to your brainwave patterns in 15 minutes and keeps improving with use.

📡

Works With Any Device

Bluetooth and USB-C support for computers, tablets, smart TVs, and power wheelchairs.

🔒

On-Device Privacy

All brain data is processed locally. Nothing is ever sent to the cloud or internet.

How It Works

Easy to set up.
Life-changing results.

Getting started takes just four simple steps — and the first time you move a cursor with your mind, everything changes.

1

Put It On & Power Up

The adjustable band places all 32 sensors automatically. No gel or extra steps.

2

15-Minute Calibration

The AI guides you through a short session to learn your unique brain patterns.

3

Connect Your Devices

Pair via Bluetooth or USB-C. Manage everything through the free iOS/Android app.

4

Think. Control. Live.

Just think about the action. The headset reads it and makes it happen in under a second.

Neural Interface Technology

Your thoughts,
translated instantly.

The headset detects neural signals and maps them to real device actions — cursor movement, typing, scrolling, wheelchair control, and more.

Who It Helps

Made for everyone.
Especially those
who need it most.

Built alongside disability advocates, therapists, and doctors from day one. NeuroLink Pro was designed to work for real people with real needs.

ALS
Spinal Cord Injuries
Cerebral Palsy
Locked-In Syndrome
Tremor Disorders
Muscular Dystrophy
Stroke Recovery
TBI Rehabilitation
Patient Stories

Real lives. Real impact.

After my ALS diagnosis I lost the ability to type within eight months. NeuroLink Pro gave me back my voice, literally. I write emails, video call my family, and control my smart home — all with just my thoughts.

Marcus T. — ALS Patient, Austin TX
Built for Real Lives

Work. Connect. Play.
On your terms.

One headset. Endless possibilities — for people of every age and every condition.
